import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState, useRef } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import { X, Upload, File, FileText, FileSpreadsheet, Image, CheckCircle, AlertCircle } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import { DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES, DOCUMENT_TYPES, SECTORS } from "/src/app/data/taxonomy.ts";
export function DocumentUploadModal({ isOpen, onClose, onUpload }) {
  _s();
  const [selectedFile, setSelectedFile] = useState(null);
  const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
  const [uploadProgress, setUploadProgress] = useState(0);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    title: "",
    type: "",
    category: "",
    sector: "",
    description: "",
    version: "1.0"
  });
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState([]);
  const fileInputRef = useRef(null);
  if (!isOpen) return null;
  const allowedTypes = [
    "application/pdf",
    "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document",
    // DOCX
    "application/msword",
    // DOC
    "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
    // XLSX
    "application/vnd.ms-excel",
    // XLS
    "image/png",
    "image/jpeg",
    "image/jpg"
  ];
  const maxFileSize = 50 * 1024 * 1024;
  const validateFile = (file) => {
    const validationErrors = [];
    if (!allowedTypes.includes(file.type)) {
      validationErrors.push("File type not supported. Please upload PDF, DOCX, XLSX, or image files.");
    }
    if (file.size > maxFileSize) {
      validationErrors.push("File size exceeds 50MB limit.");
    }
    return validationErrors;
  };
  const handleFileSelect = (file) => {
    const validationErrors = validateFile(file);
    if (validationErrors.length > 0) {
      setErrors(validationErrors);
      setSelectedFile(null);
      return;
    }
    setErrors([]);
    setSelectedFile(file);
    if (!formData.title) {
      const fileName = file.name.replace(/\.[^/.]+$/, "");
      setFormData({ ...formData, title: fileName });
    }
  };
  const handleDragOver = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setIsDragging(true);
  };
  const handleDragLeave = () => {
    setIsDragging(false);
  };
  const handleDrop = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setIsDragging(false);
    const file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
    if (file) {
      handleFileSelect(file);
    }
  };
  const handleFileInputChange = (e) => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (file) {
      handleFileSelect(file);
    }
  };
  const handleSubmit = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!selectedFile) {
      setErrors(["Please select a file to upload"]);
      return;
    }
    if (!formData.title || !formData.type || !formData.category || !formData.sector) {
      setErrors(["Please fill in all required fields"]);
      return;
    }
    setUploadProgress(0);
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      setUploadProgress((prev) => {
        if (prev >= 100) {
          clearInterval(interval);
          return 100;
        }
        return prev + 10;
      });
    }, 100);
    setTimeout(() => {
      onUpload({
        file: selectedFile,
        ...formData
      });
      setSelectedFile(null);
      setFormData({
        title: "",
        type: "",
        category: "",
        sector: "",
        description: "",
        version: "1.0"
      });
      setUploadProgress(0);
      setErrors([]);
    }, 1200);
  };
  const getFileIcon = (file) => {
    if (file.type.includes("pdf")) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileText, _fgS: "bkaa0", _fgB: 1779104383191, className: "w-12 h-12 text-red-400", "data-fg-bkaa0": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:158:14:3999:47:e:FileText::::::B1i5" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx",
        lineNumber: 178,
        columnNumber: 14
      }, this);
    } else if (file.type.includes("word")) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileText, _fgS: "bkaa1", _fgB: 1779104383191, className: "w-12 h-12 text-blue-400", "data-fg-bkaa1": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:160:14:4106:48:e:FileText::::::B1i5" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx",
        lineNumber: 180,
        columnNumber: 14
      }, this);
    } else if (file.type.includes("sheet") || file.type.includes("excel")) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileSpreadsheet, _fgS: "bkaa2", _fgB: 1779104383191, className: "w-12 h-12 text-green-400", "data-fg-bkaa2": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:162:14:4246:56:e:FileSpreadsheet::::::EINS" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx",
        lineNumber: 182,
        columnNumber: 14
      }, this);
    } else if (file.type.includes("image")) {
      return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: Image, _fgS: "bkaa3", _fgB: 1779104383191, className: "w-12 h-12 text-purple-400", "data-fg-bkaa3": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:164:14:4363:47:e:Image::::::CO8z" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx",
        lineNumber: 184,
        columnNumber: 14
      }, this);
    }
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: File, _fgS: "bkaa4", _fgB: 1779104383191, className: "w-12 h-12 text-gray-400", "data-fg-bkaa4": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:166:12:4429:44:e:File::::::DEHK" }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx",
      lineNumber: 186,
      columnNumber: 12
    }, this);
  };
  const formatFileSize = (bytes) => {
    if (bytes === 0) return "0 Bytes";
    const k = 1024;
    const sizes = ["Bytes", "KB", "MB", "GB"];
    const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
    return Math.round(bytes / Math.pow(k, i) * 100) / 100 + " " + sizes[i];
  };
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "bkaa5", _fgB: 1779104383191, _fgD: true, className: "fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm", "data-fg-bkaa5": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:178:5:4795:10405:e:div:e:1", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "bkaa6", _fgB: 1779104383191, className: "bg-[#0d2738] border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-3xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto", "data-fg-bkaa6": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:179:7:4900:10289:e:div:xtete", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "bkaa8", _fgB: 1779104383191, className: "flex items-center justify-between p-6 border-b border-white/10", "data-fg-bkaa8": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:181:9:5053:522:e:div:ete", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "bkaa9", _fgB: 1779104383191, "data-fg-bkaa9": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:182:11:5144:212:e:div:ete", children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "h2", _fgS: "bkaa10", _fgB: 1779104383191, className: "text-xl font-semibold text-white", "data-fg-bkaa10": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:183:13:5162:69:e:h2:t", children: "Upload Document" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx",
          lineNumber: 203,
          columnNumber: 13
        }, this),
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "p", _fgS: "bkaa12", _fgB: 1779104383191, className: "text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1", "data-fg-bkaa12": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:184:13:5244:95:e:p:t", children: "Upload PDF, DOCX, XLSX, or image files (max 50MB)" }, void 0, false, {

    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "form", _fgS: "bkaa16", _fgB: 1779104383191, onSubmit: handleSubmit, className: "p-6 space-y-6", "data-fg-bkaa16": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:194:9:5585:9591:e:form:xtxtxtetxtetxtetxte", children: [

        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "label", _fgS: "bkaa28", _fgB: 1779104383191, className: "block text-sm font-medium text-gray-300 mb-3", "data-fg-bkaa28": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:211:13:6270:113:e:label:t", children: "Select File *" }, void 0, false, {

            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "p", _fgS: "bkaa52", _fgB: 1779104383191, className: "text-xs text-gray-400 mt-2", "data-fg-bkaa52": "618.69:618.15208:/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx:270:21:8879:76:e:p:txt", children: [

            }, this)
          ] }, void 0, true, {

if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentUploadModal.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
